# CWE-179 positive: validation before URL decoding (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-179-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"regexp"
	"strings"
)

var slugPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$`)

// CWE-179 Incorrect Behavior Order: Early Validation
// Vulnerable line: validates encoded slug, then QueryUnescape expands attacks.
func ResolveSlug(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.URL.Query().Get("slug")
	if !slugPattern.MatchString(raw) {
		http.Error(w, "invalid", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	decoded, err := url.QueryUnescape(raw)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "invalid", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"slug": strings.ToLower(decoded)})
}
